ddls:
CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "auth_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the author */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the author */,
  "birthday" TEXT /* Date of birth of the author */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Author's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Author's phone number */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the author */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Author's gender */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* JSON object to store social media links */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the author profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the author profile was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("auth_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "writing_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each writing statistic entry */,
  "auth_id" TEXT /* Reference to the author */,
  "writing_date" TEXT /* Date of the writing session */,
  "hrs_writing_per_day" INTEGER /* Number of hours spent writing on that date */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Number of words written on that date */,
  "project_id" TEXT /* Reference to the project the author is working on */,
  "collaborators" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of collaborator IDs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the writing statistic was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the writing statistic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_writing_stats_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_writing_stats_auth_id FOREIGN KEY ("auth_id") REFERENCES authors ("auth_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "author_country" (
  "auth_id" TEXT /* Reference to the author */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("auth_id", "country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_authors" (
  "project_id" TEXT /* Reference to the project */,
  "auth_id" TEXT /* Reference to the author */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author in the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "auth_id")
)
